name: mostSetFBlockID, mostSetFunctionID, mostSetOpType
title: mostSetFBlockID, mostSetFunctionID, mostSetOpType
description: Set the FBlockID, FunctionID or OpType of the message.
Since the FBlockID, FunctionID and OpType are part of the message ID these functions change the ID as well.

parameters.name: msg
parameters.description: Variable of type mostMessage or mostAMSMessage.
